subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter numbered 12 hath been received. Thou hadst made mention of receiving two packets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما نمره ۱۲ وصول یافت اشاره بوصول دو پاکت نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
